prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约10898→10143→20820→93864→22493，2023年因广西首次新高考改革出现大幅后移，2024年因专业组细分出现极端低位（护理学等不 限选科专业），2025年回归至22493名，近两年基准约2.2万名；该校在广西物理类招生计划2021年33人、2022年34人、2023年34人、2024年44人、2025年49人， 2026年计划54人，较2025年扩招约10.2%，扩招幅度中等，对竞争有一定稀释作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名从2021年第103名持续 上升至2026年第63名，排名提升显著，反映学校综合实力和认可度稳步增强；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要因2025年录取季在河北、河南等省份位次下 滑超500名，中医学专业在东北省份出现断档；抖音热度一般，短视频平台关注度不高；投档异常信号为低关注，对广西考生心理影响有限；第五轮学科评估数 据缺失，；但作为全国中医药院校中唯一的211高校，中医学、中药学等主干学科具有行业领先地位。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业（临床医学、口腔医学）持 续高热推荐，中医药相关专业受益于整体医学热度；广西2026年物理类考生约26.4万人，较2025年增加约1.45%，竞争略有加剧；北京中医药大学位于北京，对广西考生属跨省报考，地域偏好因素中性；该校在广西招生占比约2%-3%，属常规外省招生规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次224 93名、2026年扩招约10.2%、软科排名持续上升（增强吸引力）、医学专业热度高（推高竞争）以及广西考生小幅增加等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次；预测最低位次约23670名，区间23170–24170名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the Physics Category was approximately 10898 → 10143 → 20820 → 93864 → 22493. In 2023, due to Guangxi's first new college entrance examination reform, there was a significant backward shift. In 2024, due to the subdivision of major groups, there was an extreme low ranking (nursing and other majors with no subject restrictions). In 2025, it returned to 22493, with the baseline for the past two years around 22,000. The university's enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Guangxi was 33 in 2021, 34 in 2022, 34 in 2023, 44 in 2024, 49 in 2025, and 54 in 2026, an increase of about 10.2% compared to 2025. The expansion is moderate, which has a certain diluting effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has continuously risen from 103rd in 2021 to 63rd in 2026, reflecting a significant improvement in comprehensive strength and recognition. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to a ranking decline of over 500 places in provinces such as Hebei and Henan in the 2025 admission season, and a gap in the Chinese Medicine major in northeastern provinces. Douyin popularity is average, with low attention on short video platforms. The abnormal signal for admission is low attention, which has limited psychological impact on Guangxi candidates. Data from the fifth round of discipline evaluation is missing. However, as the only 211 university among national Chinese medicine institutions, its main disciplines such as Chinese Medicine and Chinese Materia Medica hold a leading position in the industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors (Clinical Medicine, Stomatology) continue to be highly recommended, and Chinese medicine-related majors benefit from the overall medical popularity. In 2026, there are approximately 264,000 Physics Category candidates in Guangxi, an increase of about 1.45% compared to 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition. Beijing University of Chinese Medicine is located in Beijing, which is an inter-provincial application for Guangxi candidates, with a neutral regional preference factor. The university's enrollment proportion in Guangxi is about 2%-3%, which is a typical scale for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 22493, an enrollment expansion of about 10.2% in 2026, the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings (enhancing attractiveness), high popularity of medical majors (pushing up competition), and a slight increase in Guangxi candidates, the predicted minimum ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 23670, with a range of 23170 to 24170.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 23170 to 24170, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Chinese Medicine 5-Year Program, Chinese Materia Medica, etc.) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Leading Talent Cultivation Program, 5+3 Integrated) can be used as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Nursing, Chinese Medicine Pharmacy, etc.) as a safe backup. When the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1310 → 1049 → 1671 → 2980 → 2387, showing an overall fluctuating and shifting trend. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform, the ranking significantly dropped to 2980, and in 2025 it slightly recovered to 2387, with a baseline of about 2400–3000 in the past two years. The enrollment plan for this university in Guangxi's History Category was 5 students in 2021, 4 in 2022, 4 in 2023, 3 in 2024, and 4 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 5 students, a 25% increase compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion and has a notable dilution effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science ranking has continuously risen from 103rd in 2021 to 63rd in 2026, a significant improvement that enhances the overall attractiveness of the school. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to ranking declines and signs of gaps in multiple provinces in 2025. Douyin popularity is average; the abnormal admission signal is low attention, which has limited psychological impact on Guangxi candidates. The History Category majors include English (Medical/Traditional Chinese Medicine International Communication), Acupuncture and Tuina, and Public Affairs Management, which are not the university's core advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among the History Category majors, Acupuncture and Tuina benefits from the popularity of medical fields, while language and management majors have average popularity. In 2026, there are approximately 128,000 History Category candidates in Guangxi, an increase of about 7.25% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Provincial control line data for 2026 is missing. Beijing University of Chinese Medicine is located in Beijing, which is an inter-provincial application for Guangxi candidates, with neutral regional preference. The university's enrollment in Guangxi's History Category is small (4–5 students), with a stable enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 2387, a 25% enrollment expansion in 2026, the rise in Soft Science ranking (enhancing attractiveness), an approximately 7.25% increase in Guangxi History Category candidates (intensifying competition), and a somewhat negative reputation, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 History Category is approximately 2645, with a range of 2169–3121.
